architecture.routing: server/routes.ts (API endpoints, user auth, position management, AI bridge)

services.price_service: server/services/price-service.ts (Core logic for Google Sheets and Fintables Scraper)
services.price_monitor: server/services/price-monitor.ts (15m intervals for stocks, CRON jobs for funds)
services.ai_analysis: server/prompt.ts (System instructions for Gemini 1.5 Flash portfolio insights)

bist_stock_logic.primary: Google Sheets JSON API (via Apps Script)
bist_stock_logic.fallback: Current price from DB (positions.currentPrice) or null
bist_stock_logic.registration: Auto-sends IST:SYMBOL to Sheets Webhook on creation

us_stock_logic.primary: Google Sheets JSON API (via Apps Script)
us_stock_logic.fallback: Current price from DB (positions.currentPrice) or null
us_stock_logic.registration: Auto-sends NASDAQ:SYMBOL to Sheets Webhook on creation

parsing_hierarchy.step_1: Robust Regex match on '"price":' pattern within HTML stream data

scraper_details.optimization: Uses render=false for 20x faster response time (~2s) and lower quota usage.

fund_logic.fallback_2: Returns null if no fallback available

optimization_notes.zero_mock_policy: Fiyat bulunamazsa null dönülür, asla sahte/random fiyat üretilmez.
optimization_notes.ios_pwa_ux: Vaul DrawerModal kullanımı, visualViewport dinleyicileri ve safe-area-inset yönetimi.
optimization_notes.ai_context: Her mesajda tüm portföy snapshot'ı (JSON) sisteme enjekte edilir.
optimization_notes.error_handling: Fiyat hatasında AlertCircle ikonu gösterilir ve maliyet (buyPrice) üzerinden hesaplama devam eder.
